title: agrostis scabra var. geminata
intro: Agrostis scabra var. geminata, also known as bentgrass or ticklegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis scabra var. geminata include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
